title: The Paradox of Choice
script: Excessive choice can ironically lead to decreased satisfaction and decision paralysis, a concept widely explored.

title: Cognitive Dissonance
script: Cognitive dissonance arises when an individual holds conflicting beliefs, attitudes, or values, causing mental discomfort.

title: Quantum Entanglement
script: Quantum entanglement describes a phenomenon where two particles become interconnected, irrespective of the distance separating them.

title: Sustainable Urbanism
script: Sustainable urbanism integrates ecological principles into city planning, fostering resilient and environmentally conscious communities.

title: Artificial General Intelligence
script: Achieving Artificial General Intelligence remains a formidable challenge, requiring vast computational power and novel algorithms.
